changelog:
🔹 AI Voice Assistant Anti-Crash: Added a 10-minute automated memory flush (Garbage Collector) to prevent the application from auto-closing during long listening sessions.
🔹 Modern UI Transitions: Implemented 'Shared Axis' (Horizontal) slide-fade effects for Liked Songs, Recently Played, and Playlist navigation for a buttery-smooth experience.
🔹 Universal Audio Support: Added native file scanning support for .opus, .flac, .webm, and .ogg formats alongside traditional formats.
🔹 Performance: Optimized the Category Screen to render instantly by removing artificial loading delays and main-thread I/O checks.
